zh.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn)是Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn和Ingeborg Tunadotter的女兒，出生。她於1304年1月26日之前與Magnus Marinasson結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年6月之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn)是Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn和Ingeborg Tunadotter的女儿，出生。她于1304年1月26日之前与Magnus Marinasson结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1331年6月之后。

nameMeanings.name: Kristina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a feminine form of Latin Christianus ( see Christina ). Queen Kristina of Sweden ( 1626–89 ) succeeded her father Gustavus Adolphus in 1632 . Growing to adulthood, she presided over a glittering court, but in 1654 she abdicated, left Sweden dressed as a man, converted to Roman Catholicism, and lived for most of the rest of her life in Rome.

variants.name: Christina
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn) was born as the daughter of Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn and Ingeborg Tunadotter. She married Magnus Marinasson before 26 January 1304. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 1 daughter. She died after June 1331.

fr.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn) est née, fille de Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn et Ingeborg Tunadotter. Elle a épousé Magnus Marinasson avant 26 janvier 1304. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après juin 1331.

de.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn) wurde, als Tochter von Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn und Ingeborg Tunadotter geboren. Sie hat vor 26. Januar 1304 Magnus Marinasson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach Juni 1331.

it.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn) è nata il come figlia di Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn e Ingeborg Tunadotter. Lei sposato Magnus Marinasson prima del 26 gennaio 1304. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il giugno 1331.

ja.Of, Daga District, Sodermanland, Sweden: スウェーデンスoデルマンランド
ja.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn)はBirger Håkansson HjorthornとIngeborg Tunadotterの娘として生まれた。1304年1月26日以前にMagnus Marinassonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1331年6月以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn)(은)는 Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn(와)과 Ingeborg Tunadotter의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1304년 1월 26일 이전 Magnus Marinasson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 6월 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn) nasceu filha de Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn e Ingeborg Tunadotter. Ela casou-se com Magnus Marinasson antes 26 de janeiro de 1304. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após junho de 1331.

ru.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn) родилась. Её родителей звали Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn и Ingeborg Tunadotter. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Magnus Marinasson перед 26 январь 1304 г. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла после июнь 1331 г.

es.lifeSummary: Kristina Birgersdotter (Hjorthorn) nació como hija de Birger Håkansson Hjorthorn y Ingeborg Tunadotter. Se casó con Magnus Marinasson antes de 26 de enero de 1304. Fueron padres de por lo menos 13 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de junio de 1331.
